hero.alt: A beautiful portrait of a Mantis Shrimp in the wild
hero.caption: The Mantis Shrimp is a highly adapted species with unique behaviors.

habitat.fileTitle: File:Camarón mantis (Odontodactylus scyllarus), Anilao, Filipinas, 2023-08-24, DD 164.jpg

habitat.caption: They make their home in diverse habitats where they can find shelter and thrive.

diet.alt: A Mantis Shrimp finding or consuming food
diet.caption: Finding food is a major part of the daily routine for a Mantis Shrimp.

baby.alt: A young or baby Mantis Shrimp showing early development
baby.caption: Baby Mantis Shrimps must learn to survive and adapt from a young age.

family.caption: While often solitary, some Mantis Shrimps interact with others of their species.

range.alt: A Mantis Shrimp traveling across its geographic range
range.caption: Their geographic range covers various regions suited to their survival.

size.caption: The size of a Mantis Shrimp can vary depending on its age and environment.
